author: Jdthomas24
description: Monitor device check-in health across Zigbee, Z-Wave, Matter, Hub Mesh, LAN, Virtual and Hub Variable — learns each device's normal pattern and alerts you when something goes quiet.
releaseNotes: v1.5.8 — Hue Bridge/Konnected Panel verification now confirms reachability immediately on a successful call and retries every scan instead of every other, resolving stuck devices in one Force Scan instead of 2-3 — also fixes Konnected devices not being marked Unverifiable on failed verification, and removes Quiet/verified devices from Active Issues in both the app and web portal.
